article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.1. Attachment 2 - Proposed Supplementary Zoning Bylaw Text Amendments 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Zoning Bylaw Amendments to Add Five New Zoning Districts
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on text amendments to Burnaby's Zoning Bylaw that would create five new zoning districts — including Employment (E1), Industrial (I1), Parks/Open Space (PM1), Institutional (PM2), and Agricultural (AM1) — plus dozens of updated definitions and rules to support the city's OCP 2050 land use plan.
briefs.action_required: Review the proposed zoning changes to see if your property or business use is affected before Council votes.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Agriculture, Landlord & Property Mgmt
